docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY HETZEL, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT OLD FIRST PRESBYTERIAN CHURCH OLD FIRST CONCERTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-06-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, SERVICE FEE: $150.00 AS TO DEFENDANT OLD FIRST PRESBYTERIAN CHURCH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-02-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $110.00 AS TO DEFENDANT OLD FIRST CONCERTS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT TO JUN-10-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LINDA HETZEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OLD FIRST PRESBTRERIAN CHURCH IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY ; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IF NO PAYMENT HAS BEEN MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LINDA HETZEL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT OLD FIRST PRESBYTERIAN CHURCH AND OLD FIRST CONCERTS ARE NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
